summary: Iteration 13: Frontend-only testing for Service Areas scroll fix (P0) and Refrigerator Repair page content corrections (P1). ALL TESTS PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Service Areas scroll uses scrollToAnchor() with retry mechanism. Map section has id='service-area'. Refrigerator page has custom header (hides main navbar).

TEST_1_Desktop_Areas_Dropdown.details: Clicking 'Areas' dropdown then 'View service area map →' scrolls from position 0 to 4608. #service-area element visible.

TEST_2_Mobile_Hamburger_Menu.details: Opening hamburger menu and clicking 'Service Areas' closes menu and scrolls from 0 to 4631. Map section visible at viewport.

TEST_3_Cross_Page_Navigation.details: From /about page, clicking Areas > 'View service area map →' navigates to homepage AND scrolls to position 4608. Service area section visible.

TEST_6_Door_Seal_Emoji.details: Door Seal Worn problem chip uses wrench emoji (🔧), no door emoji (🚪) found

TEST_7_Brand_Links.details: All 8 brand names are clickable links: Sub-Zero (/sub-zero-appliance-repair), Viking (/viking-appliance-repair), Thermador (/thermador-appliance-repair), Samsung (/samsung-appliance-repair), LG (/lg-appliance-repair), Whirlpool (/whirlpool-appliance-repair), GE (/ge-appliance-repair), Bosch (/bosch-appliance-repair)

TEST_8_Final_CTA_Headline.details: Final CTA heading says 'Get Your Refrigerator Running Like New' (correct)

TEST_9_Final_CTA_Subtitle.details: Final CTA subtitle says 'SCHEDULE TODAY' (correct, not 'Don't Wait')

verified_features: 1. Desktop: Areas dropdown → 'View service area map →' scrolls to #service-area
2. Mobile: Hamburger menu → 'Service Areas' closes menu and scrolls to map
3. Cross-page: From /about, Areas dropdown navigates to homepage AND scrolls to map
4. Refrigerator page: Reviews show 'Google: 82 reviews · Thumbtack: 117 reviews'
6. Refrigerator page: Door Seal Worn uses wrench emoji (🔧)
7. Refrigerator page: All 8 brand names are clickable links to correct pages
8. Refrigerator page: Final CTA headline 'Get Your Refrigerator Running Like New'
9. Refrigerator page: Final CTA subtitle 'Schedule Today'
